tool_input.command:
cat processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-feature-details.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s2', 's3']:
        print(f\"=== {s['id']}: {s['title']} ===\")
        print(s['content'][:1500])
        print()
"
